name: @caia/ea-drift-sentinel
description: EA Drift Sentinel sub-agent — subscribes to the event bus firehose, detects events whose payloads indicate a violation of an architecture principle / ADR / prior decision, and emits architecture.principle.violated events. Two-tier detection (mirrors the ea-architect critic pattern): tier 1 = deterministic regex / structural checks on event payloads (cheap, fast); tier 2 = LLM-reasoned checks invoked ONLY on tier-1 hits (bounds LLM spend at small fraction of overall framework cost). Escalates to operator via INBOX when severity warrants. Maintains an audit log at caia-ea/drift-log/<date>.jsonl.
